query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.xml:
<results>
  <Day index="6">
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Sunset Grill</name>
      <time_block>9:00 AM - 10:00 AM</time_block>
      <description>Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 20-30</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Family breakfast</highlight>
        <highlight>Kid-friendly menu</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <POI>
      <name>Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride</name>
      <time_block>10:30 AM - 1:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk and Ferry</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 35</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Outdoor nature</highlight>
        <highlight>Kid-friendly family activity</highlight>
        <highlight>Bike riding</highlight>
        <highlight>Beach access</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Island Cafe Picnic Lunch</name>
      <time_block>1:30 PM - 2:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 25</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Casual outdoor lunch</highlight>
        <highlight>Family friendly</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <POI>
      <name>Ripley's Aquarium</name>
      <time_block>3:30 PM - 5:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.</description>
      <travel_method>Ferry and Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 45</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Indoor attraction</highlight>
        <highlight>Kid-friendly family activity</highlight>
        <highlight>Marine life</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>The Keg Steakhouse</name>
      <time_block>7:00 PM - 8:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 60-80</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Family dinner</highlight>
        <highlight>Steakhouse</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
  </Day>
  <Day index="7">
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Fran's Restaurant</name>
      <time_block>8:30 AM - 9:30 AM</time_block>
      <description>Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 20</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Classic diner</highlight>
        <highlight>Toronto institution</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <POI>
      <name>Royal Ontario Museum</name>
      <time_block>10:00 AM - 12:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 23</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Indoor museum</highlight>
        <highlight>Cultural experience</highlight>
        <highlight>Natural history</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Eataly Toronto</name>
      <time_block>12:30 PM - 1:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 35-50</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Indoor restaurant</highlight>
        <highlight>Italian cuisine</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <POI>
      <name>Distillery District Walk</name>
      <time_block>3:00 PM - 5:00 PM</time_block>
      <description>Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.</description>
      <travel_method>Public Transit</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>Free</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Outdoor walking tour</highlight>
        <highlight>Historic architecture</highlight>
        <highlight>Artisan shops</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Cluny Bistro</name>
      <time_block>7:00 PM - 9:00 PM</time_block>
      <description>French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 70-90</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Romantic dinner</highlight>
        <highlight>French bistro</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
  </Day>
  <Day index="8">
    <POI>
      <name>Niagara Falls Day Trip</name>
      <time_block>8:00 AM - 6:00 PM</time_block>
      <description>Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.</description>
      <travel_method>Tour Bus</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 150</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Outdoor nature</highlight>
        <highlight>Scenic waterfall</highlight>
        <highlight>Full day trip</highlight>
        <highlight>Iconic destination</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Elements on the Falls</name>
      <time_block>1:00 PM - 2:00 PM</time_block>
      <description>Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 45</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Falls view dining</highlight>
        <highlight>Tourist spot</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Antler Kitchen</name>
      <time_block>8:00 PM - 9:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.</description>
      <travel_method>Taxi</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 80-100</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Unique Canadian cuisine</highlight>
        <highlight>Game meat</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
  </Day>
  <Day index="9">
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Lady Marmalade</name>
      <time_block>9:00 AM - 10:30 AM</time_block>
      <description>Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.</description>
      <travel_method>Taxi</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 25-35</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Trendy brunch</highlight>
        <highlight>Creative dishes</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <POI>
      <name>Eaton Centre Shopping</name>
      <time_block>11:00 AM - 1:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Major downtown shopping mall with hundreds of stores. Indoor shopping for souvenirs, clothing, and gifts. Climate-controlled and convenient.</description>
      <travel_method>Public Transit</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>Variable</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Indoor shopping mall</highlight>
        <highlight>Souvenir shopping</highlight>
        <highlight>Major retailers</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Urban Eatery Food Court</name>
      <time_block>1:30 PM - 2:15 PM</time_block>
      <description>Food court in Eaton Centre with diverse quick options. Fast and convenient but generic mall food.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 15</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Quick lunch</highlight>
        <highlight>Food court</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
    <POI>
      <name>Queen Street West Boutiques</name>
      <time_block>3:00 PM - 5:00 PM</time_block>
      <description>Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.</description>
      <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>Variable</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Boutique shopping</highlight>
        <highlight>Independent stores</highlight>
        <highlight>Outdoor walking</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </POI>
    <Restaurant>
      <name>Bar Isabel</name>
      <time_block>7:30 PM - 9:30 PM</time_block>
      <description>Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy.</description>
      <travel_method>Taxi</travel_method>
      <expected_cost>CAD 70-90</expected_cost>
      <highlights>
        <highlight>Tapas sharing</highlight>
        <highlight>Celebratory atmosphere</highlight>
      </highlights>
    </Restaurant>
  </Day>
</results>

raw_result.reasoning: Found 4 days with no work commitments (expected_cost 'Work') and no flights: Day 6, Day 7, Day 8, Day 9
